title: vicia fulgens
intro: Vicia fulgens, also known as the Scarlet Clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Vicia fulgens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Vicia fulgens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a food source for livestock.
